title: Why Western Digital Stock Crashed, and Intel and Qualcomm Followed Today
text: Computer investors beware: 2023 could be rough.

title: Western Digital, Micron, Nvidia Fall On Chip Glut Amid Recession Fears
text: Shares in flash memory chipmaker Western Digital tumbled on a Goldman Sachs downgrade, also dragging down Micron Technology. The post Western Digital, Micron, Nvidia Fall On Chip Glut Amid Recession Fears appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.

title: Western Digital Gets Sell Rating on Fears Its NAND Memory Unit Will Ramp Up Debt
text: Goldman Sachs analyst Toshiya Hari, on Thursday, lowered his rating on the company to Sell from Neutral.

title: Western Digital Stock Drops on Downgrade
text: Western Digital Corp (NASDAQ:WDC) stock is having a rough day, down 9.5% at $32.42 at last glance, after Goldman Sachs downgraded the stock to "sell" from "neutral," with a price-target cut to $31 from $43.

title: This is the Best Tech Stock to Own in December
text: The Federal Reserve's interest rate hike campaign, in conjuction with layoffs from mega firms such as Meta Platforms (META) and Amazon.com (AMZN), have put the tech sector in focus of late.
